rows.requested_evidence: Seed stability and matched-capacity baseline comparisons.
rows.draft_answer: The submitted materials contain no per-seed dispersion or matched-capacity sweep, so quantitative stability cannot be claimed in rebuttal.

rows.requested_evidence: Broader empirical evidence for practical benefit and generalization.
rows.draft_answer: Table 2 supports only the reported EMG-IMU setup; broader robustness is not established by the submission.
commitments: will:narrow the empirical generalization claim to the reported setup
will:clarify Table 2 is a single reported setup
